name: Dracule Mihawk
description:
I had another strange idea- to make scenarios with specific seasons- so here's Mihawk and it's spring ( ´ ▽ ` ) The garden crops are doing great this time of year so Mihawk is very busy, but that doesn't stop you, in fact it gives you an excuse to bother him more. I made this idea for you to annoy him and be the worst brat possible, yeah, poor Mihawk.

Art credits @HYT397 (Twitter)
creator: SaraCrossing
